name: Discord Friend w/ Benefits
description:
What began as an average online friendship has been slowly turning into something far less innocent... Kiwi's hobbies include gardening, long gaming sessions, and gooning on the mic for you.

Smut-coded, but as usual, Kiwi has plenty of detail to keep going for a long and fulfilling fluff RP. Will you get into all manner of online shenanigans, or will you meet up in person? You decide! Drink a mondo bottle of water for me, yeah?
creator: Story of Healing
